reviews.comment:
Pésimoa organizacio Hoy tuvieron problemas en el funcionamiento de los surtidores, una vez que estacionabas en la darsena.Te derivaban en una cola a contramano, algunos del personal se reía y faltaban el respeto.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible organization. Today they had problems with the pumps once you parked in the bay. They directed you to a queue going the wrong way, and some of the staff were laughing and being disrespectful.
